rules.structural_signal: Sorted input with pair satisfying arithmetic constraint
rules.constraints: input is sorted or can be sorted without losing information

rules.structural_signal: Unsorted input with pair satisfying arithmetic constraint, need indices
rules.constraints: cannot sort (need original indices) or O(1) lookup needed

rules.structural_signal: Remove or filter elements in-place preserving order
rules.constraints: must modify array in-place

rules.structural_signal: Aggregate (sum/max/count) over all contiguous subarrays of fixed size
rules.constraints: window size is fixed and known

rules.structural_signal: Find longest/shortest contiguous subarray satisfying a constraint
rules.constraints: elements are non-negative for sum-based constraints

rules.structural_signal: Count or find subarrays summing to target when values can be negative
rules.constraints: negative values prevent sliding window; use cumulative sum difference

rules.structural_signal: Find target or boundary in sorted data or monotonic search space
rules.constraints: search space has monotonic property

rules.structural_signal: Multiple range sum queries on static array
rules.constraints: array does not change between queries

rules.structural_signal: Range queries with point or range updates on dynamic array
rules.constraints: need both queries and updates in O(log n)

rules.structural_signal: Find maximum sum contiguous subarray with possible negatives
rules.constraints: contiguous subarray only; values can be negative

rules.structural_signal: Partition array into exactly three groups in-place
rules.constraints: exactly three categories; single pass

rules.structural_signal: Merge, insert, or analyze overlapping intervals
rules.constraints: sort intervals by start time first

rules.structural_signal: Find missing/duplicate number when values are in range [1, n]
rules.constraints: values must be in bounded integer range

rules.structural_signal: Count occurrences of each element for frequency-based decisions
rules.constraints: need element-to-count mapping

rules.structural_signal: Group elements by computed equivalence key
rules.constraints: key function must be consistent for equivalent items

rules.structural_signal: Validate nested open/close delimiter matching
rules.constraints: multiple delimiter types require stack; single type uses counter

rules.structural_signal: Find next greater/smaller element for each position
rules.constraints: maintain monotonic invariant in stack

rules.structural_signal: Shortest path or minimum steps in unweighted graph/grid
rules.constraints: all edges have equal weight

rules.structural_signal: Shortest path in weighted graph with non-negative edges
rules.constraints: no negative edge weights

rules.structural_signal: Order tasks/items respecting dependency constraints in a DAG
rules.constraints: graph must be acyclic; cycle means no valid order

rules.structural_signal: Track connected components as edges are added dynamically
rules.constraints: supports union and find, not deletion

rules.structural_signal: Count or fill connected regions in a 2D grid
rules.constraints: mark visited cells to avoid revisiting

rules.structural_signal: Detect cycle in linked list or iterative sequence
rules.constraints: fast moves 2 steps, slow 1 step

rules.structural_signal: Find k largest/smallest elements from stream or collection
rules.constraints: k << n; use min-heap of size k for k largest

rules.structural_signal: Maintain running median as elements arrive
rules.constraints: maintain max-heap for lower half, min-heap for upper half

rules.structural_signal: Find maximum/minimum in every sliding window of size k
rules.constraints: maintain monotonic deque; front is always the answer

rules.structural_signal: Recursive solution with overlapping subproblems and optimal substructure
rules.constraints: define state clearly; check for optimal substructure

rules.structural_signal: Select items with cost/weight to reach target capacity/sum
rules.constraints: each item used once (0/1) or unlimited (unbounded)

rules.structural_signal: Align or compare two sequences optimally
rules.constraints: 2D DP table; optimize space to O(min(n,m))

rules.structural_signal: Generate all subsets, permutations, or combinations
rules.constraints: n must be small (subsets: n<=20, permutations: n<=10)

rules.structural_signal: Search words by prefix or build autocomplete
rules.constraints: many prefix queries on same dictionary

rules.structural_signal: Find minimum spanning tree in sparse graph
rules.constraints: graph must be connected for MST; produces forest otherwise

rules.structural_signal: Compute aggregate from children before processing parent
rules.constraints: process children before parent (postorder)

rules.structural_signal: Find lowest common ancestor of two nodes in tree
rules.constraints: both nodes must exist; BST can use value comparison

rules.structural_signal: Shortest path in graph with negative edge weights
rules.constraints: negative cycles make shortest path undefined

rules.structural_signal: Evaluate or parse mathematical expression with operator precedence
rules.constraints: handle precedence: *, / before +, -; parentheses override

rules.structural_signal: Select items to maximize value within capacity where some items are grouped and must be taken all-or-nothing
rules.constraints: items within a group are coupled — take all or none; individual items are standard 0/1; reduces to grouped knapsack DP

rules.structural_signal: Assign items 1-to-1 between two groups to minimize the maximum cost across all pairs
rules.constraints: greedy nearest-match fails; binary search on answer + bipartite feasibility check; threshold D is feasible iff bipartite graph of pairs with cost <= D has perfect matching

rules.structural_signal: Find total completion time in a DAG where independent branches execute in parallel
rules.constraints: parallel execution means the bottleneck is the LONGEST path, not shortest; topological sort then DP tracking max arrival time at each node

rules.structural_signal: Assign items from group A to group B (1-to-1) to maximize total value of assignments
rules.constraints: greedy highest-value-first fails because it can block better global assignments; use Hungarian algorithm or max-weight bipartite matching

rules.structural_signal: Choose subset of N items optimizing a metric where N is moderate (20-40) and item values are too large for DP array
rules.constraints: N too large for 2^N brute force but too large values for DP; split into two halves, enumerate 2^(N/2) each, combine with two-pointer or binary search

rules.structural_signal: Minimize the maximum or maximize the minimum of some metric where feasibility can be checked efficiently
rules.constraints: answer space is monotonic — if D is feasible then D-1 is also feasible (or vice versa); binary search over answer space and check feasibility in O(N) or O(N log N)

rules.structural_signal: Maximize minimum distance between repeated elements by rearranging, where answer depends on max frequency
rules.constraints: when the answer is determined by max element frequency f and total count N, a closed-form O(N) solution exists: answer = (N - count_of_max_freq_elements) / (f - 1); avoids O(N log N) binary search

rules.structural_signal: Maximize/minimize value with constraints that carry forward across decisions
rules.constraints: when constraints are coupled across decisions (e.g., cooldown, budget, state-dependent transitions), greedy local optima diverge from global; need DP with proper state

rules.structural_signal: DP where optimal next choice depends on which choice was made previously, not just position
rules.constraints: define dp[i][state] where state encodes the relevant prior choice; common states: hold/not-hold, cooldown days, last-used color/type

rules.structural_signal: Select non-overlapping intervals to maximize total weight/profit
rules.constraints: unweighted greedy (sort by end) fails when intervals have different values; sort by end, DP with binary search for latest non-overlapping predecessor

rules.structural_signal: Find maximum flow through a capacitated network from source to sink
rules.constraints: max-flow = min-cut duality; Dinic's is O(V^2*E) general, O(E*sqrt(V)) on unit networks

rules.structural_signal: Find vertices whose removal disconnects an undirected graph
rules.constraints: single DFS pass with disc[]/low[] arrays; undirected graphs only

rules.structural_signal: Find edges whose removal disconnects an undirected graph
rules.constraints: DFS with low[to] > disc[v] (strictly greater); undirected graphs only

rules.structural_signal: Find a path or circuit that visits every edge exactly once
rules.constraints: undirected: all even degree for circuit, exactly 2 odd for path; directed: in=out for circuit; Hierholzer's O(V+E)

rules.structural_signal: Assign true/false to variables satisfying pairwise boolean constraints (2 literals per clause)
rules.constraints: exactly 2 literals per clause; build implication graph, find SCCs; unsatisfiable iff x and NOT x in same SCC; O(N+M)

rules.structural_signal: Each node has exactly one outgoing edge; query where you end up after K steps
rules.constraints: binary lifting: jump[v][k] = 2^k-th successor; O(N log N) build, O(log N) per query; cycle detection via Floyd's in O(N)/O(1)

rules.structural_signal: Many range minimum or maximum queries on a static (immutable) array
rules.constraints: O(N log N) build, O(1) per query for idempotent operations (min, max, gcd); does NOT support updates

rules.structural_signal: Find all occurrences of a single pattern in a text string
rules.constraints: Z-function or KMP both O(N+M); Z-function often cleaner to implement; rolling hash is probabilistic alternative

rules.structural_signal: Compare many substrings for equality in O(1) after preprocessing
rules.constraints: polynomial hash with large prime mods; double hashing reduces collision probability; O(N) preprocess, O(1) per comparison

rules.structural_signal: Answer multiple queries about all substrings of a string (count distinct, longest repeated, etc.)
rules.constraints: suffix automaton O(N) build with ≤2N-1 states; suffix array + LCP is 4-8x less memory; suffix tree has large constant

rules.structural_signal: Generate all prime numbers up to N or test many numbers for primality
rules.constraints: O(N log log N) time, O(N) space; only sieve up to sqrt(N); practical limit ~10^7; use segmented sieve for large ranges

rules.structural_signal: Find the smallest convex polygon enclosing a set of 2D points
rules.constraints: Andrew's monotone chain: sort by (x,y), build upper+lower hull; O(N log N) is optimal (proven lower bound)

rules.structural_signal: Find the minimum distance between any two points in a 2D point set
rules.constraints: divide and conquer or sweep line; strip optimization: each point checks at most 7 neighbors; O(N log N)

rules.structural_signal: Count elements in the union of overlapping sets using alternating inclusion and exclusion
rules.constraints: N sets must be small (≤20-25) due to 2^N blowup; |A∪B∪C| = |A|+|B|+|C| - |A∩B| - |A∩C| - |B∩C| + |A∩B∩C|

rules.structural_signal: Determine winning/losing positions in a two-player impartial game with perfect information
rules.constraints: Grundy number = mex of successors' Grundy values; position loses iff Grundy=0; sum of games: XOR Grundy values; Nim: XOR pile sizes

rules.structural_signal: DP partitioning into groups where optimal split points are monotone non-decreasing
rules.constraints: reduces O(M*N^2) to O(M*N*log N); cost function must satisfy QI so opt split points are monotone

rules.structural_signal: Interval DP where cost satisfies quadrilateral inequality allowing narrowed split search
rules.constraints: reduces interval DP from O(N^3) to O(N^2); opt(i,j-1) <= opt(i,j) <= opt(i+1,j)

rules.structural_signal: DP where value function is piecewise-linear convex, transitions add absolute values or take prefix minima
rules.constraints: represent function by slope change points in priority queue; transitions modify the queue; O(N log N)

rules.structural_signal: Query historical versions of a data structure or find k-th smallest in a range
rules.constraints: path copying: O(log N) new nodes per update; O(N + Q*log N) total space; supports querying any version in O(log N)

rules.structural_signal: Need a balanced BST supporting split and merge as fundamental operations
rules.constraints: randomized priorities maintain balance; O(log N) expected; implicit treap indexes by subtree size for sequence operations

rules.structural_signal: Process 2D geometric events by sweeping a line across one coordinate
rules.constraints: sweep vertical line left to right; maintain active set in balanced BST by other coordinate; Bentley-Ottmann: O((N+K) log N)
